entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange within the Planet Finance ecosystem on BNB Chain. DefiLlama continues to report non-zero TVL and recent DEX volume, and the first-party Planet Finance application remains reachable, so HEI classifies Blue Planet as active.
entity.notes: No reliable first-party launch date was recovered during this batch, so launch_date remains null. Current activity is supported by DefiLlama metrics rather than inferred from website reachability alone.

evidence.title: Blue Planet protocol profile and DEX metrics
evidence.notes: Profile classifies Blue Planet as a BSC AMM DEX and reports non-zero TVL and recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: Planet Finance application
evidence.notes: First-party application endpoint associated with the Blue Planet protocol profile.
